summary: iOS | Free 60 artwork missing, and update from v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) to latest not working (Studio iOS or PTT)
scenario: Free 60 artwork missing after updating from v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) to latest on Studio iOS or PTT, with DFU blocked by low iPhone battery.
description_clean: Free 60 artwork missing. Update from v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) to latest not working on Studio iOS or PTT. DFU not possible due to low iPhone battery. No artwork displayed.
steps: 1. Ensure iPhone has sufficient battery charge (currently too low for DFU).
2. Charge the iPhone to at least 50% battery.
3. Update from v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) to the latest version on Studio iOS or PTT.
4. After update, check if the Free 60 artwork is displayed.
expected: Free 60 artwork is displayed correctly after the update.
actual: Free 60 artwork is missing. No artwork displayed. Update from v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) to latest not working on Studio iOS or PTT. DFU not possible due to low iPhone battery.
